data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. RENOVATION SHOW produced a big late finish last start, charging through from the tail of the field and putting them away with authority at double-figure odds. He meets a similar field, and he is good enough to repeat the dose. 2. CHEVAL SAVANT returned in great order at York, running a bold third first-up, and he was at long odds that day. He is usually even better second up, and the inside draw should have him parked much closer. The extra ground suits, and he is an each-way hope again. 1. PURE CHINO never got warm last time after a narrow defeat at this track and trip the run prior, but that earlier effort was no fluke. He is worth another chance. 4. LORDGIVEMESTRENGTH is better than what he showed last outing, and he is just the type who can cause an upset in a race like this.","runners":[3,2,1,4],"exclusive":true}
